detail.description:
Welcome to Homescapes, a warm and cozy game from the famous Playrix Scapes™ series! Make match-3 combinations and turn every corner of your home into an inviting place to relax and have fun.

Solve puzzles, restore the interior room by room, and meet new friends in every chapter of the exciting storyline. Austin the butler is ready to welcome you to a world of incredible adventures!

Game features:
● Original gameplay: make match-3 combinations and decorate your house while enjoying an exciting
detail.recentChanges:
AROUND THE WORLD
• Help William meet up with his old friends and rediscover the joy of life!
• Complete the event and get valuable rewards!

MOTORHOME
• Go on a trip in a motorhome and bring the Wood family closer together!
• Complete the event and get valuable rewards!

ALSO
• A new chapter: The Fortune Teller's Apartment! What is the mysterious neighbor Mina hiding—and should you fear her curse!?
